calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Feb-27-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Gail Diston appeared via CourtCall in pro per administrator.

Ms. Diston stated that she was unable to locate any of the decedent's sons, that she has an uncashed money order in the amount for $2,499.26. Status on close of estate is taken under submission with the intent to terminate estate.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Dec-27-2023 Continued To Jan-24-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to Gail Diston, Administrator in propria persona, to appear on Jan-24-2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why she failed to appear at the hearing on Dec-27-2023. Gail Diston is Ordered to Show Cause, on Jan-24-204 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204, why the Estate should not be closed, forthwith. The subject matter is continued to the same date.

Judge: Hon. Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Svahlin. Not Reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Final Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Aug-09-2023 Continued To Sep-20-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Final Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Jun-28-2023 Continued To Aug-09-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: No appearance is made by any counsel, party, or interested person.

An Order to Appear and Show Cause shall issue to Gail Diston to appear on August 9, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to show cause as to why no appearance was made at hearing on June 28, 2023 and further, as to why sanctions pursuant to C.C.P. Sec.128 in the amount of $250.00 should not be imposed against her for failure to appear. Status on the filing of the Final Inventory & Appraisal is continued to that date.

Judge: Hon. Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Bailiff: Deputy Choi. Reporter: Not Reported. (D204)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Final Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar May-31-2023 Continued To Jun-28-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Gail Diston (administrator) appeared by courtcall in propria persona.

Mrs. Diston stated that she completed the inventory and appraisal and mailed it to the probate referee, that it should be done by now and that she will go to her PO Box today to see if she has received it. Status on filing of the final inventory and appraisal is continued to June 28, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The court reminded Mrs. Diston that status on close of the estate is set for December 27, 2023.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Probate Examiner: Aeyoung Kim. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Choi. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Final Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Apr-05-2023 Continued To May-31-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Dec-06-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Gail Diston, via Zoom, in propria persona, Petitioner.

The court confirms with Ms. Diston of her understanding that if appointed by the court as Administrator, she must abide by the obligations as shown in the Duties and Liabilities which include, but are not limited to, keeping Estate assets segregated and fully insured, pay valid creditors, and not making distributions without court approval. The court advises Petitioner of her responsibility to determine the Estate's value via the probate referee who will be appointed by the court. The court acknowledges Petitioner's efforts with this matter and confirms with her that she does have a resource to provide her with assistance if needed.

After additional discussion, the court confirms that there are no appearances to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration. Gail Diston is appointed Administrator of the estate with limited authority. Bond is set at $20,000. Isidoor Bornstein is appointed probate referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on Filing Final Inventory and Appraisal is set for Apr-05-2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Status on close of estate is set for Dec-27-2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed two weeks prior, the status hearing will be taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Nazaruz. Not Reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Oct-18-2022 Continued To Dec-06-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Gail Diston, via Zoom, in propria persona, Petitioner.

The court and Ms. Diston discuss her additional efforts to locate the children of the decedent after the last hearing in this matter. The court confirms with Ms. Diston that the children would have priority to be appointed. Ms. Diston offers advocacy for her appointment as Administrator and advises that she has support for her appointment from a number of the decedent's siblings. Ms. Diston advises that she has obtained a $20k bond in the event she is appointed Administrator. The court advises that it will be continuing this matter and recommends that Ms. Diston file declarations from as many siblings as possible stating that they nominate her appointment as Administrator.

The matter is continued to Dec-06-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Choi. Not Reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Oct-04-2022 Continued To Oct-18-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Aug-02-2022 Continued To Oct-04-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Gail Diston, via Zoom, in propria persona, Petitioner.

The court summarizes the previous calling of this matter and queries Ms. Diston regarding her efforts to locate the decedent's children. Ms. Diston advises that she has attempted to contact one of the sons but that he was recently injured in an accident and has been hospitalized. The court confirms with Ms. Diston that she knows where the son lives.

After additional discussion, the matter is continued to Oct-04-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Kahler. Not Reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jun-21-2022 Continued To Aug-02-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Gail Diston, in court, in propria persona, Petitioner.

The court confirms with Ms. Diston's relationship to the Decedent and queries her regarding what she intends to do as Administrator if she is appointed. Ms. Diston offers testimony regarding her plans if appointed. The court reminds her that the Decedent's sons would be entitled to any of the Decedent's assets and that she needs to somehow locate them and provide them with notice of this action.

After additional discussion, this matter is continued to Aug-02-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Bastain. Not Reported.
